Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs

Class NewEventDialog

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.window.Window
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs.EventBDialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs.NewEventDialog
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.window.IShellProvider
public class NewEventDialog extends EventBDialog
This class extends the Dialog class and provides an input dialog for new event with some parameters, guards and actSubstitutions.

    • NewEventDialog

      public NewEventDialog(AbstractEventBCreationWizard wizard, IMachineRoot root, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Shell parentShell, String title)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      wizard - the parent wizard of this dialog
      root - the root element to which events will be added
      parentShell - the parent shell of the dialog
      title - the title of the dialog
